back_translation: Judas, slave of Jesus Christ and younger-brother of James, to those who have been called, who are loved in God the Father, and who are kept in Jesus Christ
May mercy, peace, and love be multiplied to you all

Beloved, when I had striven fully to write to you all about the salvation that we share, I considered it necessary to write to you all, to urge you to contend strongly for the faith that has been entrusted to all the saints once-for-all-time

Because some men have crept into your midst unnoticed. These are ungodly, designated long ago for this judgment. They distort the grace of our God into licentiousness, and they deny our only Master and Lord, namely Jesus Christ
I want to remind you all, even though you all have known once-for-all-everything, that Jesus has saved His people out of the land of Egypt, and afterward destroyed those who did not believe
And the angels who did not keep their position, but abandoned their own dwelling, He has bound in eternal chains under darkness, awaiting the judgment on that great day
Just like Sodom and Gomorrah and the surrounding cities, that gave themselves over to fornication and pursued unnatural flesh, which have been set as an example showing the punishment of eternal fire
However, these people are also similar — being those who receive visions in dreams, they defile the flesh, reject authority, and slander the glorious-ones
But even archangel Michael, when he disputed with the devil concerning the body of Moses, did not dare to utter words of insulting judgment, but said, ‘May the Lord rebuke you’
But these people slander things they do not understand. As for things they know by instinct, like wild animals lacking reason, they will be destroyed in those things
Woe to them, because they have walked in the way of Cain, and have thrown themselves into the error of Balaam for hire, and have perished in the rebellion of Korah

These people are hidden rocks in your love-feasts, sharing meals with you fearlessly, shepherding only themselves. They are clouds without water carried by the storm. They are autumn trees without fruit, twice-dead and uprooted
They are wild waves of the sea, foaming-out their own shame. They are wandering stars, for whom thickest darkness has been reserved forever
Enoch, who is the seventh from Adam, also prophesied concerning these people: ‘Behold, the Lord has come with His many holy ones
To judge everyone, and to rebuke all the ungodly concerning all the evil deeds they have done, and concerning all the harsh words that sinners and ungodly people have spoken against Him’
These people are constant grumblers, fault-finders, walking according to their own desires, and their mouths speak boastful things, flattering others to gain advantage
But beloved all, remember the words spoken before by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ
Because they have told you that ‘In the last age there will be scoffers, those who walk according to their own ungodly desires’
These people are the ones who cause divisions, being worldly, lacking the Holy Spirit
But beloved all, build yourselves up in the most holy faith of yours, pray in the Holy Spirit
Keep yourselves in the love of God, while waiting for the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ, that will lead you to eternal life
And have mercy on some who are still uncertain
Save some by snatching them out of the fire, and have mercy on some with fear, hating even the clothing that is stained with the flesh
May glory be to Him who is able to protect you from stumbling-falling, and to bring you to stand before His glory without blemish, with great joy
To God who is our only Savior, through our Lord Jesus Christ, may glory, majesty, mighty-power, and authority be to Him before all time, both now and throughout all ages. Amen
